sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6842" key="a)nakuklhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακυκλ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n6842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must employ a cycle of treatment,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg011:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
